valueSection.title: Design that proves its value
valueSection.subtitle: At Echocode, design is not just about visuals. It’s about creating hypotheses that turn into measurable product growth. We are looking for a designer who understands the business value of product decisions and can justify them with data and user behavior.

section01.title: What will you be working on?

val01.title: End-to-end Product Design:
val01.desc: Participation in product strategy formation together with the CEO and engineering team.

val02.title: Conversion Design:
val02.desc: Designing and testing interfaces that increase LTV and conversion rates.

val03.title: RATEDesign System:
val03.desc: Maintaining and evolving a scalable design system in Figma.

val04.title: RATEUser Feedback:
val04.desc: Analyzing feedback and iterating UX improvements.

val02.title: Figma Expert Level
val02.desc: Deep knowledge of Auto Layout, Variables and Prototyping.

val03.title: Understanding user psychology
val03.desc: Knowledge of user behavior principles and behavioral economics.

val04.title: Understanding technical platform limitations
val04.desc: Knowing what is easy for developers to implement and what is not.

val01.title: Ability to justify design decisions
val01.desc: Every decision is based on a hypothesis, data, and measurable product impact.

val02.title: Willingness to work with product metrics
val02.desc: We work with conversions, funnels, and flows — not only aesthetics.

val03.title: High level of autonomy
val03.desc: Ability to independently drive a task from idea to measurable result.

step01.title: Step 01
step01.subTitle: Portfolio Review
step01.desc: We evaluate design thinking, decision logic, and real product impact.

step02.title: Step 02
step02.subTitle: Design Challenge
step02.desc: We evaluate how you formulate hypotheses and work with constraints.

step03.title: Step 03
step03.subTitle: Interview
step03.desc: Conversation with the product team about approach, process, and collaboration.

step04.title: Step 04
step04.subTitle: Offer
step04.desc: Transparent offer and start of cooperation without unnecessary steps.
